payload.notes: Order found with ID ORD-2041 but delivery date not provided

payload.rationale: Delivery has been delayed by two weeks, no movement in tracking, and customer is expecting a resolution today.

payload.english:
Dear Aina, 
We apologize for the inconvenience caused by the delayed delivery of your order ORD-2041. Unfortunately, we are unable to resolve this issue today, and a refund will be processed for the full amount of MYR 89.00 to the original payment method. Please allow 5-7 business days for the refund to be credited.
payload.bahasa_malaysia:
YB Aina,
 Kami mohon maaf atas mengapa pihak kami gagal dalam menyelesaikan tempahan nombor ORD-2041. Sayangnya, kami tidak dapat menangani isu ini hari ini, dan kami akan mengeluarkan pengembalian penuh sebanyak RM 89.00 kepada kaedah pembayaran asal. Sila beritahu kami 5-7 hari kerja bagi tempoh pengembalian ini.

payload.supervisor_note: Escalate for resolution despite automated decision, as customer is expecting resolution today due to delivery delays

payload.rationale: Insufficient order information, cannot proceed with customer's request.

payload.english: We are unable to locate your order, ORD-1111, and therefore cannot proceed with returning it. Our team will review this further.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Kami tidak dapat menemukan pesanan anda, ORD-1111, dan oleh itu, kami tidak dapat memproses permintaan balik pesanan tersebut. Tim kami akan membantu memeriksa ini lebih lanjut.

payload.supervisor_note: Insufficient order information, requires manual review to verify customer claim.

payload.notes: No customer information available for this issue.

payload.rationale: Complaint lacks context and specific details.

payload.english: We appreciate your feedback, but we cannot fulfill your request as it lacks necessary context and details. If you have any further concerns, please feel free to reach out to us.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Kami menghargai maklum balas anda, namun kami tidak dapat memenuhi permintaan anda kerana kurangnya konteks dan maklumat yang diperlukan. Jika anda mempunyai tindakan lanjut, sila hubungi kami.

payload.supervisor_note: Lack of context and specific details requires closer examination, no customer information available for this issue.

payload.notes: Order details not provided or available

payload.rationale: Insufficient order information to proceed with the refund request

payload.english: Thank you for reaching out to us. Unfortunately, we are unable to process your cancellation request at this time due to insufficient information. We kindly request that you provide the necessary details so we can assist you further.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Terima kasih atas kejadian tersebut. Sayangkan, kami tidak dapat mengeluarkan proses pembatalan permintaan anda pada masa ini disebabkan oleh informasi yang tak mencukupi. Kami berharap dapat mendapati maklumat yang diperlukan untuk menolong.

payload.supervisor_note: Order details not provided or available, potential issue with refund request

payload.notes: Refund request for ORDER ORD-2041, Baju Kurung Moden - Maroon XL

payload.rationale: Clearly damaged delivered item and the customer has made a refund request

payload.english: We sincerely apologize for the damaged item you received, Aina. We have processed a refund for your order ORD-2041. You will be informed once the refund has been successfully issued.
payload.bahasa_malaysia: Kami mengakui kesalahan atas penerimaan barang rosak, Aina. Kami telah menghantar pengembalian dana untuk pesanan ORD-2041. Anda akan dimaklumkan apabila pengembalian dana berjaya ditunaikan.

payload.supervisor_note: Review refund request for damaged item
